member.name: Member
member.description: Can send messages and join collaborative scopes

moderator.name: Moderator
moderator.description: Can manage messages and scoped resources

admin.name: Admin
admin.description: Can delegate access and manage roles

guards.message: Only message authors can edit messages.
Only message authors or moderators can delete messages.
